Funny thing is, he may be the only one I can trust. Warning: Although this series deals with angels and demons, there is nothing religious about them. Anyone looking for that within the pages of these books will be disappointed. If you enjoy a slow burn, forced proximity, adversaries to lovers romance that’s them against the world; with found family; biological family; best friends; a protective, morally gray hero—who would burn the worlds down for the heroine and absolutely end anyone who harms her; a heroine determined to do what it takes to save everyone she cares about, mythology that ranges from Celtic to Greek to Chinese, and more; with angels, demons, and reapers; and absolutely no religious overtones (or undertones; there are no tones,) this is for you. **This book is part of a series and ends on a hook.

title: Becoming a Goddess: The Dragon God's Wife Book 1 (Dragon Shifter Romance)
author: Mac Flynn
description: Anna Roberts was a very normal office worker from our world, another person living day to day and dreaming of a different life. Her dream comes true in a spectacular fashion when she finds a forbidden fruit and takes a bite. The fruit grants her immortality and a new life among the gods who treat her sudden appearance with more than a little apprehension. Lord Eastwei is the dragon god, known as much for his icy composure as his incredible magic. He’s millions of years old but his indifference toward most people means he has yet to take a wife, though more than one fair goddess has tried to woo him. Very little surprises him until he finds the confused Anna in the gardens of his palace, a picture of a perfect goddess that slowly begins to intrigue him. Anna’s arrival upends not only Eastwei’s gardens but also the matrimonial plans of more than one goddess toward the handsome lord. Her unfamiliar mannerisms and even more unfamiliar cooking lead her to become admired and envied, a volatile mix that finds her facing jealousies and intrigues. Now Anna must figure out how to manage all the challenges that come with being a goddess even as the handsome Eastwei's attentions toward her begin to grow.

title: Wild Game (Wilding Pack Wolves 1) - Wolf Shifter Paranormal Romance
author: Alisa Woods
description: Owen’s an ex-Army bodyguard for a beautiful gaming heiress… and a man with a secret. Ex-Army Texas boy Owen Harding fears only one thing—his inner beast. A year in Agent Smith’s experimental cages has changed his wolf into something monstrous. But a hate group is hunting the Wilding pack, so Owen’s serving again, this time as bodyguard. If only the girl he’s protecting wasn’t so damn sexy… and completely off limits. Nova Wilding’s father was assassinated, leaving her a gaming company to run, a new game to release, and a pack full of wolves who want her for a mate… including a beta who’s determined to have Nova and her company. When a bomb goes off in her car, Nova finds herself in her sexy bodyguard’s arms… but he’s absolutely the wrong man at the wrong time. While Nova fights to keep her gaming company afloat, and Owen fights to keep her alive, the hate group circles closer and closer… until they both find that falling in love might be the most dangerous game of all. WILD GAME is a complete novel with HEA, the first in the Wilding Pack Wolves series. All stories are standalone, but for maximum reader enjoyment, start with the Riverwise Private Security trilogy. Contains scorching hot shifters, alpha military heroes, and sexy female gamers.

title: The Tide of Destiny (The Druids of Destiny Series Book 1)
author: Shanna Murchison
description: Three desperate brothers on the run amid a civil war. One woman who's the gateway to love and peace--if she can accept her druid powers, and stay alive.... Northern Wales, 1144 Angharad flees from an enforced marriage to a vicious neighboring lord. Instead of gaining her freedom, she's taken captive by Rhys, the Silver Wolf, a powerful Welsh warrior determined to avenge his family, victims of a civil war triggered by Cadwalader, the brother of the rightful prince Owain. Angharad thought her Fate would be to retire to a convent, but with war raging throughout the land she loves, it's clear her tide of destiny has turned. Angharad forsakes the way of the saints for that of the sword, joining forces with the handsome Rhys and his two brothers, and his rapidly dwindling band of increasingly desperate warriors. When Cadwalader invites Danish mercenaries from Dublin to invade Wales, Angharad and Rhys discover the druidic powers within themselves they've always possessed, but tried to suppress. Only by daring to trust to love and their mystical abilities can the sensual couple prevent their whole world from being destroyed. Rhys and Angharad desperately to cling their last shreds of hope, and each other. Their tempestuous passion cannot be denied. But how can it ever exist in the hell Cadwalader has created? Angharad and Rhys must risk all to defeat the evil prince and restore peace. Will their druid ways prove enough to stop a Viking invasion? Or will their love become just another casualty of war...? ++ Word Count =119,975 ++ Sensuality Rating This novel contains some language and topics, and several explicit love scenes between the hero and heroine. It is for mature audiences. About the Author Shanna Murchison is the author of The Druids of Destiny series.

title: Sold to the Berserkers: A Menage Shifter Romance (Berserker Saga Book 1)
author: Lee Savino
description: One glance and we knew she was ours. We’re the Berserkers. Fearless warriors. And she’s our captive. The woman who can tame us. The only one who can soothe our inner beasts. Her scars lead to her past. She’s been hurt. Sold to us in the middle of wilderness. Now, there are no boundaries. She’s ours to protect. To endlessly pleasure. We need her to break the curse. So, she must choose. Will she escape? Or take her place as our true mate?

title: A Vampire Bewitched (Deathless Night Series Book 1)
author: L.E. Wilson
description: 🩸 Fated mates. 🧛 Protective vampire hero. 💔 Scarred heroine. 🔥 Forced proximity. 💀 Danger & redemption. Fate has a twisted sense of humor.😈 Fated mates didn’t really exist. Not for monsters like him. Or so Nikulas thought... until he met her. One taste of her forbidden blood was all it took to realize the truth—Emma Moss was his. And he could never claim her. He needs her magic to help him rescue his brother, but he refuses to drag her deeper into his dark world. The supernatural forces aligning against them already scarred her once. He won’t let them touch her again. She deserves more. More than a life in the shadows with a vampire. More than him. But when danger closes in and desire burns hotter than blood, Nik will have to decide— Let her go to keep her safe... Or risk everything for the witch who bewitched him. Hell... especially from himself. ✨ A Vampire Bewitched , book 1 in the Deathless Night series , is a spicy, action-packed paranormal romance with fated mates, forbidden desire, and a possessive, protective vampire who’ll burn the world to save the woman he can’t have.

title: Caged: Fae Fantasy Romance (A Court of Passion Book 1)
author: Mac Flynn
description: Elina is a fae of the Western Woods, a region filled with tall forests and green fields. She lives a life of peaceful bliss until the day her father, the king of the fae, dies. Then everything goes wrong. Her uncle assumes the throne, and his heart is as cruel as the biting north wind. He gives her only two choices: to be sold as a bride to the dragon king of the southern region or be ‘removed’ from the line of succession. Elina chooses to cling to life and arrives at the southern capital city of the ancient dragon king, a creature tens of thousands of years old. She discovers a vibrant city with many sights and many secrets. The worst-kept secret is the size of the king’s harem. He hosts dozens of women from all the surrounding kingdoms, and she finds herself awash in a sea of unfamiliar, and sometimes hostile, faces. Competition for the king’s affection is fierce among those seeking favors, and her pretty face is a magnet for jealousy and cruel tricks. Now, Elina must face a new life and new dangers as she navigates a world of dark lies and even darker plots. All the while, a pair of golden dragon eyes watches her very closely.

title: The Vampire Game
author: Zara Novak
description: Lucien Voss wakes from ten years of slumber to find his Coven is a mess. His uncle has been murdered. A dangerous vampire has taken over. Now it’s up to Lucien to fight back. First, he ventures into the city for a night of company. Ten years have a habit of making a vampire restless, and boy, he is feeling restless. The night seems like any other at the start, but then he sees her for the first time. Emily. Emily is caught in the middle of an extremely strange night, and thing only get stranger when she lays eyes on him. Lucien. Dark hair, pale skin, sparkling red eyes. His control over her seems effortless, and it isn’t long until she’s helplessly under his spell. That’s when she learns the truth. He’s a vampire. And not a good one. Fate thrusts the pair together and lust and loathing quickly spark. It’s all Emily can do to run away, but it soon becomes apparent that sticking together might be the better option. Both their lives hang in the balance now, and there’s only one way to get out: They have to play The Vampire Game. *** The Vampire Game is a 120k standalone romance. It's action-packed, hot as sin, and has a HEA. Enjoy!

title: Enchanted Sea & Song: The Songstress and the Pirate Book 1 (Dragon Shifter Romance)
author: Mac Flynn
description: An office worker by day and a singer by night, Rose Larkin’s life is busy but unsatisfying. That all changes when she’s summoned against her will into a new world of magic. Rose’s kidnappers need her unique voice for their dark scheme, a voice that takes on magical properties in the new world. She’s tossed into the hold of a fast schooner, intent on taking her to their paymaster. Their plans are interrupted by an even faster ship captained by the notorious pirate Marcellus Torvus, who steals her from her kidnappers. The cunning captain navigates through storms and her stormy heart as he takes a keen interest in his new cargo. Rose’s only thought is to get back home, but as she spends more time with the pirate, she begins to learn that fate has a funny way of dropping you right where you need to be. Now they just need to survive long enough to realize that destiny.

title: Psycho: A Shifter MC Romance (Bayou Wolves MC Book 1)
author: C.J. Pinard
description: Not completely psychotic, but keep pushing him… Wolf shifter Sheppard Madden came from nothing. Following horrific events that left him with the nickname Psycho, he formed the Bayou Wolves MC after fleeing Minnesota. There in the Crescent City, he finds a pack of likeminded wolves and humans who are loyal to him and follow his lead without question. To all outward appearances, Psycho and his men are just another club doing charity events and everything else legal. But this club has much darker things happening behind the scenes. The Wolves get a call from another MC that they have a victim needing protection. Psycho and his men go get her, but she’s not what they were expecting. With defiance in her purple-blue eyes, all Nera Kennedy wants is to go home after surviving an ordeal she’d rather forget. Psycho has convinced her to stay within the protective confines of the Bayou Wolves’ compound, but will she continue to be shielded from the bastards who took her, or will the Wolves not be enough to protect her? Psycho is book 1 in the Bayou Wolves MC series and is for readers 18 and older. Please check the trigger warning on the second page. ✔Shifter romance ✔Touch her and d!e ✔He falls first ✔Werewolf Motorcycle Club ✔Strong FMC ✔Steamy PNR

title: Devour Me, Alpha: A Steamy Werewolf Shifter Romance (The Savage Hearts Series)
author: Alisson Bento
description: "I told you the forest had teeth. You should have listened." Leah Hart is running for her life. Leaving behind a suffocating past in Chicago and a man who called his control "love," she seeks sanctuary in the rugged silence of the Oregon Cascades. She wanted a fresh start. She wanted peace. Instead, she found him. Kael is the Alpha of the Blackmoon pack—a massive, scarred king of a dying territory who rules with iron discipline and lethal secrets. From the moment he catches Leah’s scent, his wolf screams one word: MINE. Kael knows a human mate is a death sentence for his pack. He tries to scare her away, to be the monster she expects, but the fated bond won't be denied. When a rival pack leader from Kael’s past realizes the Alpha has a weakness, Leah is no longer just a woman in hiding. She is a prize in a brutal war. After a violent abduction drags Leah into the heart of a mountain stronghold, she must stop being the prey and start being the Luna she was born to be. She will have to trade her fear for fire, her silence for a howl, and her heart to the man who would burn the world to keep her safe. In the shadows of Silverwood, blood will be spilled, marks will be claimed, and an ancient bond will be sealed in the heat of the night. The Alpha is hungry. And he won’t stop until he’s devoured every part of her. "Devour Me, Alpha" is a high-heat, standalone fated-mates romance featuring a possessive, protective hero, a resilient heroine who finds her inner strength, and a guaranteed HEA (Happily Ever After). Tropes: Fated Mates: Primal recognition and biological destiny. Forced Proximity: Trapped in the Alpha’s mountain lodge for protection. Grumpy x Sunshine (with a bite): A stoic hero and a heroine who refuses to break. Hurt/Comfort: Healing from a traumatic past. Who Did This To You?: Vengeful protective hero moments. The "Marking" Ritual: High-heat paranormal bonding. Secret Baby: A heartwarming epilogue reveal.

title: A Match of Iron and Flame: A Dragon King Arranged Marriage Romantasy (The Savage Hearts Series)
author: Alisson Bento
description: Karys Thorne was raised for diplomacy, not sacrifice, yet when her struggling human house trades her hand to secure a fragile peace, she is sent to the volcanic peaks of Cinderfast to marry a legend—the Dragon King himself. Vhalerion Khol is rumored to be a feral conqueror with blood on his mouth and smoke in his veins, but the man waiting for her at the basalt altar is something far more unsettling: terrifyingly composed, sharply intelligent, and devastatingly disciplined. He does not ask for her submission—he demands her courage. When the ancient ceremonial fire reacts to Karys’s bloodline, an impossible truth emerges: their union is not merely a political treaty but the missing half of an ancient covenant long buried by history. From that moment on, Karys becomes a target within the royal court, facing poisoned banquets, engineered crop failures, and collapsing chambers as a hidden faction schemes to prevent the mortal queen from claiming her rightful place. Navigating a deadly court of heat-wards, secret ledgers, and treacherous nobles, Karys soon realizes that her greatest danger may not be the conspirators around her but the growing, dangerous bond forming between her and the Dragon King himself. Vhalerion holds his monstrous nature under ruthless control, yet as the threats against his new bride intensify, that restraint begins to fray, and the spark of passion between them threatens to ignite something powerful enough to change—or destroy—the entire kingdom. A Match of Iron and Flame is a sweeping epic fantasy romance filled with political intrigue, explosive magic, and a slow-burning love story perfect for readers who enjoy high-stakes fantasy worlds and powerful, smoldering relationships.

title: After Midnight: 11 Paranormal Romance & Urban Fantasy Novels Featuring Demons, Shifters, Fae, Vampires, & Other Creatures Tha
author: Christine Pope
description: When the clock strikes midnight, dark spirits rise…. Lose yourself in a collection of eleven spellbinding novels from NY Times, USA Today, and national bestselling authors! Demons and vampires come alive in these pages, creeping out after midnight along with shifters, fae, witches, and other denizens of the dark. This boxed set will enchant you from the very first page! After Midnight includes these ten full-length paranormal romance and urban fantasy novels: Chosen (The Djinn Wars: Book One) - Christine Pope Misbegotten (L.A. Nocturne: Book One) - Kat Parrish Soul Marked (I Bring the Fire: Part Seven) - C. Gockel Dark Descent (The Arondight Codex: Book One) - Nicole R. Taylor Reborn in Fire (Untamed Elements: Book One) - Kasey Mackenzie Sacrificed in Shadow (The Ascension Series: Book One) - SM Reine Hidden Blade (Soul Eater: Book One) - Pippa DaCosta Deadline (Blood Trails: Book One) - Jennifer Blackstream The Howl (The Howl: Book One) - Kat Parrish Beyond the Night (The Heroes of New Vegas: Book One) - Colleen Gleason Unquiet Souls (Project Demon Hunters: Book One) - Christine Pope

title: Bound by Fire and Magic (Hidden Book 1)
author: Jaime Rush
description: His dragon fire, her magick, a dark mystery, and hot sparks! A year ago, Elle made the mistake of falling in love with a man her family considered a bitter enemy. A Red Dragon shifter, the handsome Kirin was at once forbidden and irresistible. Then Elle’s mother disappeared, and everyone believed that Kirin's father was responsible, including Elle. When Kirin chose to side with his father, Elle vowed to never see him again. She’s found new clues in her search for her mother…but now she has a bigger problem. Summoned home by his twin sister when their father goes missing, Kirin must figure out what the ill-tempered curmudgeon was up to. When he discovers that Elle’s father has vanished as well, Kirin and Elle must combine his Dragon power with her magick to fight a very unusual beast—and find the ones they loved and lost. But as their old desires flare up again, can their burning passion overcome their past—or the danger that the future holds? What readers are saying about the Hidden series: ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ "Fascinating, action packed, and sexy paranormal." – Annetta Sweetko, Fresh Fiction ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ "What a fantabulously brilliant and unique world Jaime Rush has created in The Hidden." – Mel Thomas, SmashAttack Reads

title: The Bloodfire Curse: A Dark Fantasy Romance (Spicy Romantasy)
author: Lady Heartswell
description: He is the warlord I sworn to kill. I am the catastrophe he swore to protect. Vea I am a gutter rat. A no-name assassin from the slums with a rusted dagger and a death wish. My mission was simple: Infiltrate the Storm Citadel. Find General Valdus, the ruthless "Butcher of the Skies." End him. But I made a mistake. I missed. And when my blood mixed with his, I didn't just fail my mission—I triggered an ancient, unbreakable magic. Now, I am legally and biologically tethered to the most terrifying man in the Empire. If he dies, I die. If he hurts, I bleed. I’m trapped in his fortress, sleeping in his bed, and fighting the urge to claw his eyes out. Or perhaps... the urge to crawl into his lap and never leave. Valdus They call me a monster. They are right. I have spent a century burning rebellions to ash and enforcing the King’s will with iron and fire. I don't have a heart. I have a tactical objective. Then Vea tried to slit my throat. She is small, feral, and utterly maddening. She is also the prophesied Bloodfire Queen —a living weapon capable of unmaking the world. And I am the only thing strong enough to hold her leash. The Fae courts want her. The King wants her dead. Let them come. I will burn this kingdom to the ground before I let anyone touch what is mine . THE BLOODFIRE CURSE is a high-heat, enemies-to-lovers Dark Fantasy Romance. It features a possessive dragon shifter hero, a stabby heroine, forced proximity, "Touch Her and Die" violence, and a magical bond that requires physical contact to survive. Tropes & Themes: 🐉 Dragon Shifter Hero 🗡️ Assassin Heroine 🔗 Fated Mates (Magical Bond) 🔥 Enemies to Lovers 🛌 "There Is Only One Bed" 📏 Excessive Size Difference 💀 Dark & Gritty World Building One-Click today to start the obsession!

title: The Mystic Wolves
author: Belinda Boring
description: What would you do if a simple errand takes a deadly twist, turning you from cautious prey to dangerous predator? Someone is trying to send a deadly message to Mason, arranging the deaths of those he loves and it puts the entire pack and Alpha on high alert. Darcy understands the primal instincts driving her beloved Mason’s commands. With the help of those he sets as protectors, she learns about herself and the things she’ll need to help support her Alpha and pack. When events turn dire however, one truth offers her strength – once given, oaths are unbreakable … even if it means risking it all.

title: Gods and Mortals: Nine Novels Featuring Thor, Loki, Greek Gods, Native American Spirits, Vampires, Werewolves, & More
author: C. Gockel
description: Nine novels with modern humans facing off against heroes, Norse and Greek gods, djinn, and monsters of old … over one million words of divinely (and diabolically) inspired fantasy, adventure, and romance. Join the freshest voices in urban fantasy and paranormal, New York Times, USA Today, and Amazon bestselling authors, on unique journeys to heaven, hell, and worlds beyond. Get this heavenly collection of paranormal romance and urban fantasy ... before it’s too late! About the Books: Elsker by S. T. Bende Kristia Tostenson just found out her new boyfriend is the Norse God of Winter, and an immortal assassin destined to die at Ragnarok. Her orderly life just got very messy. Wolves: I Bring the Fire Part I - A Loki Series by C. Gockel When Amy prays for help, Loki the Norse God of Mischief and Chaos isn't the savior she has in mind. Chosen by Christine Pope When a fatal fever nearly wipes out the entire world's population, the survivors of what became known as "the Dying" believe the worst is in the past. Little do they know.... Nolander by Becca Mills A young woman from small-town Wisconsin discovers that monsters are real -- and that she might just be one herself. Twin Souls by DelSheree Gladden Uriah and Claire didn't believe in their tribal stories until Claire's poisoned and those myths spring to life to test their love and unravel destiny. Blood Debt by Nancy Straight A mythological romance: Camille is denied her father's identity until her mother's death. She discovers a family she never dreamed of and a world that should not exist. The Forgotten Ones by Laura Howard Can the magical Tuatha de Danaan, the forgotten people of Ireland, help Allison restore her mother's sanity? Relentless by Karen Lynch Sara Grey lives a double life until a fateful encounter with a sadistic vampire and a fearless warrior exposes her powerful gifts and changes the course of her life forever. Hidden Blade by Pippa DaCosta The once-revered ancient Egyptian gods aren’t dead. They’re back. And soul eater Private Investigator, Ace Dante, is in their way.

title: Mated to the Vampire: A Bloodline Vampires Novel
author: L.J. Red
description: Fierce. Fiery. Fated. She’ll either destroy him or save him. Lucian thought this hunt would be easy: Find the rogue vampire. End the threat. Wipe the memories of any humans in the way. Then he meets Dana, street-smart, tough as nails, and immune to Lucian’s vampire allure. A cop with a sharp mind and sharper edge, she’s sworn to protect her city, no matter the cost. Dana’s fiery nature ignites a primal hunger in Lucian. He craves her scent, aches for a taste of her blood, yearns to feel her beneath him, surrendering to his wicked desires. Dana doesn’t trust vampires, Lucian included. He may be impossibly sexy, all glowing eyes, dangerous aura, and raw, untamed power, but he’s a killer, just like the monster she’s hunting, and she won’t let him interfere with her mission. When a lethal conspiracy threatens Lucian’s life, Dana faces an impossible choice: Let him die … or dive into the seductive world of the vampire elite, where nothing—and no one—is as it seems. Welcome to the Bloodline Vampires: a warrior brotherhood of dark, dangerous, and deadly vampires who will stop at nothing to protect their fated mates. This book was previously published as Vampire Mate by L. J. Red.

title: The Banshee and the Yeti Mountain Man (Love in Wyrdwood): A Cozy Paranormal Monster Romance
author: Layla Kent
description: He’s a local legend. She’s a local liability. Nature and I are not friends. I prefer ovens to campfires, committee meetings to survival drills, and muffins to… whatever it is people eat when they “forage.” So when I end up chaperoning my son's middle school winter retreat in the Wyrdwoods, I fully expect cold toes, chaos, and at least one minor emotional breakdown. What I don’t expect is Silas Snow—the yeti wilderness guide with an intimidating stare, a grudgy sense of humor, and the kind of protective presence that makes my brain short-circuit. He’s not charming in a sparkly way. He’s charming in a stand-there-and-make-you-feel-safe way, which is frankly worse. Because I’m not looking for love. I’m looking for the nearest heated building. But the Wyrdwoods are full of surprises… and apparently, so is my heart. In the supernatural small town of Wyrdwood , midlife comes with moody teens, magical mayhem, and a second chance at love—with paranormal men who are anything but ordinary. From grumpy werewolf coaches to broody gargoyles and cinnamon roll orcs with tool belts, the local monsters are just as messy, magical, and swoon-worthy as the single moms who fall for them. The Love in Wyrdwood series is a collection of cozy, standalone paranormal monster rom-coms full of flirty banter, monster-sized heart, and midlife magic—proving that happily ever after might just come with claws, fur, or fangs. Spice Level 1 (Kissing, Flirty Banter with Minor Innuendo).

title: Her Brave Wolf (Marked by the Moon Book 1)
author: Kestra Pingree
description: She’s smitten by a wolf. Gwendolyn Laney was just an ordinary park ranger until the day she was bitten by a wolf, a wolf that can turn into a hot-as-sin man. There’s some kind of magic drawing her to him. Maybe someone more sensible would be worried, but not Gwen. She knows she belongs with him. He can’t have a human. Nickolas Sipe is the Alpha of Blue Pack. He has a duty to all of his wolves, and that duty means keeping humans away. Humans have no place in the pack. They’re the ones to blame for wolf-shifter misfortunes. It doesn’t matter that she gets him wild with a simple look. This human can’t be the one for him. Fated Mates. Forever Love. — Marked by the Moon is a paranormal shifter romance series for adults. Each book works as a standalone novel where the couple gets their HEA, but for the best reader experience, they should be read in order. All books have been published; this series is complete.

title: Dark Vampires Complete Box Set: Books 1-3
author: Zara Novak
description: This boxset includes all three books in the Dark Vampire series—Punished, Ravaged, and Damaged. In Punished, a human woman arrives in the dangerous vampire city of Vrakal, quickly realizing that humans rarely survive long in such dark and lawless places. Within minutes, a powerful vampire destroys a group of rivals just to claim her, asserting his control in a way she fiercely resists but cannot escape, drawing her deeper into a dangerous and strangely intoxicating world where his dominance and relentless attention begin to awaken feelings she never expected. In Ravaged, the story follows a woman who discovers she possesses a rare ability that makes her highly valuable among vampires, leading four powerful and cursed vampires to hunt her down and bring her back to their castle, where they struggle with their own monstrous nature while she becomes entangled in their dark, intense world and the complicated desires it stirs within her. In Damaged, a woman awakens chained in a basement, confronted by a mysterious vampire outlaw who claims he saved her life, turning her carefully controlled destiny—shaped by her powerful father and an arranged marriage meant to secure political power—completely upside down as she finds herself drawn toward the dangerous captor who insists she belongs to him. Together, these three stories form a dark, intense vampire romance saga filled with dangerous power struggles, forbidden attraction, and characters navigating desire, control, and survival in a brutal supernatural world.

title: Hexes and Hijinks: 10 Paranormal Cozies Featuring Witches, Wizards, Ghosts, Spirits, Talking Cats, and Much More!
author: Christine Pope
description: It's time for a magical mystery tour.... Explore new worlds of enchantment in this special boxed set of paranormal cozies from USA Today and national bestselling authors! This collection features more than half a million words of cozy goodness, with everything from talking cats to crime-solving witches, sleuthing psychics, and much, much more! This set includes the following books: Caffeine Before Curses - Christine Pope High Noon - S.E. Biglow Mystic Pieces - Ada Bell Of Potions and Portents - Nyx Halliwell Pawsitively Poisonous - Melissa Erin Jackson Dead Even - Patti Larsen The Guest Is a Goner - Carly Winter The Psychic Cat Mysteries - SM Reine Adventures of a Vegan Vamp - Cate Lawley Hazard in Hawaii - Heather Silvio

title: Why Choose One Mate? (Big And Bigger Book 1)
author: Katie Rivers
description: A fresh start. A shifter town. Two mates who refuse to share her with anyone but each other. A woman running from a toxic past doesn’t have time for love—especially not when she’s pouring her last two dollars into a dilapidated storefront. Arriving in a remote, shifter-friendly mountain town to open an artisan bakery, our fiercely independent heroine is determined to keep her emotional walls as high as her expectations for the perfect sourdough. Readers of small-town romance will love watching her biggest challenges shift from warped counters to the immediate, overwhelming attention of two very different local men. Enter a quiet, protective wolf shifter who communicates through intense stares and acts of service, and a massive, cheerful bear shifter who embodies the ultimate golden-retriever sunshine archetype. Both men quickly make themselves indispensable to her new life, bringing her rare ingredients, fixing her shop, and treating her like the center of their universe. The classic grumpy-meets-sunshine dynamic blends seamlessly when these two opposites decide they don't want to compete for her affections—they want to share. As the bakery's grand opening approaches, the simmering tension boils over into a scorching, open-door romance where she realizes this is a strict why-choose situation. With her past trauma telling her to run and their shifter instincts telling them she belongs with them, she must decide if she is brave enough to accept a low-angst, polyamorous happily-ever-after. This cozy paranormal romance delivers comfort and high heat, proving that the sweetest treats are always meant to be shared.

title: Fangs and Frenemies (Blue Moon Bay Witches Book 1)
author: Sierra Cross
description: A quirky genius bobcat shifter. A sassy ex-cheerleading vampire. A sweet—but slightly neurotic—witch. They fight crime. Hazel Greenwood’s magical career and love life are finally looking up at twenty eight. Take that, shallow Beige Witch mom and sisters! And everyone else who made her feel like an outcast growing up, just because she inherited Gran's powerful Green Magic. But when a mean girl from the past goes missing, Hazel’s thrown back into the whirlwind of small town drama, rekindled rivalries, and romantic sparks. High school’s back, witches. To clear each other's names, three supernatural frenemies must set aside ancient grudges and learn to trust each other. Because in the cozy, sea-swept village of Blue Moon Bay, Oregon, everyone’s guarding a magical secret. Will these three women, who usually can't stand each other, find love and friendship while cracking the mystery—or are they cursed to fail? Dive into a world of magical intrigue, snarky humor, heartwarming friendship, and slow burn romance. Escape to Blue Moon Bay now! Author's Note: In addition to gorgeous new formatting, this book has received a second professional proofreading pass, thanks to friendly readers pointing out that the first pass may have missed a few spots. 😅

title: The Dragon's Oath (Silver Dragon Shifter Brothers Book 1)
author: Marie Johnston
description: Deacon In hindsight, demanding a human woman swear herself to me in exchange for the life of her father wasn’t my best idea. But I saw her and I wanted her, and I need a mate. After shouldering the responsibility of all shifter-kind for so long, I acted selfishly. I know what breaking her word would cost her. Ava is the one who made an oath to me, but I might sacrifice everything to save her from it. Ava I’m supposed to hate Deacon, and I shouldn’t believe his story about dragon shifters blending in the human world, but the longer I’m around him, the harder it is not to fall under his spell. I humor the oath I made and try to get to know him, but I’ve got one foot out the door. I’ve been duped by false promises and handsome faces before, and I’m not giving up everything for a man again. Only Deacon isn’t just a man. And he has secrets that could threaten more than my heart.

title: The Witching Hour: 10 Enchanting Novels Featuring Witches, Wizards, Vampires, Shifters, Ghosts, Fae, and More!
author: Christine Pope
description: During the Witching Hour, anything is possible…. Escape into a collection of eleven magical worlds from NY Times , USA Today , and national bestselling authors! Witches and wizards roam the pages, along with psychics, fae, vampires, shifters, and more. This boxed set weaves a spell that will enchant you from the very first page! The Witching Hour boxed set includes these eleven full-length, first-in-series paranormal romance and urban fantasy novels: DARKANGEL - Christine Pope SACRIFICE ME, SEASON ONE - Sarra Cannon MAGIC IN THE BLOOD - Kat Parrish ELEMENTAL ARCANE - Phaedra Weldon SWEET DESIRE - Stacy Claflin CRESCENT CALLING - Nicole R. Taylor BLOODSICK - Melissa F. Olson WITCH WAYS - Katie Tate SHADES OF MAGICK - Julia Crane CAGED WOLF - SM Reine
